ESTCOND00 parent Diff repair fallback trigger

Purpose:
- Trigger .github/workflows/estcond00-parent-diff-repair.yml via push path fallback.
- Repair remaining public shelf parent Diff-ID drift from DIFF-20260630-0003 to DIFF-20260627-0002.
- Update ESTCOND00 route package manifest after repair.

Boundaries:
- No FTP.
- No Search Console.
- No production sitemap apply.
- No live WordPress MU plugin deployment.
- No owner QA return.
